scripts.check: pnpm run check:specs && pnpm run check:docs && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm -r run check
scripts.check:docs: find README.md docs features -type f \( -name '*.md' -o -name '*.yaml' \) -print0 | xargs -0 perl -ne 'print "$ARGV:$.: trailing whitespace\n" if /[ \t]$/; close ARGV if eof' && ! grep -R -n -E '<<<<<<<|>>>>>>>|=======' README.md docs features
scripts.effect:diagnostics: sh -c 'status=0; for f in packages/*/tsconfig.json; do echo "== $f =="; effect-language-service diagnostics --project "$f" --format text || status=$?; done; exit "$status"'
